title: Templatize common I/O
outcome: Three template skills (ADR, agent-prompt, workflow-manifest) with markdown+frontmatter bodies under .agents/skills/templates/ and kind=template wfos records. _validate_skills checks template validator non-empty, body exists, and frontmatter parses.
validation: moon run ontarch:validate PASS for 3 template records. Templates resolve via ontarch skills resolve to repo-local body paths.
decisions: POC scope: 3 templates only; RD/PRD/TRD/ARD/SOP family extends same pattern per agent-skills.md
token_note: Agent sends template parameters, not a re-derived prompt — medium token lever.
